scripts.build: tsc -b && mkdir -p dist/proto && cp src/proto/compiled.js dist/proto/compiled.js
scripts.compile-proto: pbjs -t static-module -w es6 -o src/proto/compiled.js src/proto/gtfs-realtime.proto src/proto/nyct-subway.proto && node scripts/fix-esm-import.mjs && pbts -o src/proto/compiled.d.ts src/proto/compiled.js
